description: Deterministic repeated repository-task families for Neo's evidence learning loop.

task_families.subject: pattern: validate request payloads
task_families.body: Validate request payloads before invoking repository services.
task_families.query: add an endpoint that processes a request payload

task_families.subject: pattern: bypass request validation
task_families.body: Skip request validation to reduce endpoint latency.
task_families.query: speed up request payload processing by bypassing validation

task_families.subject: pattern: cache authorization globally
task_families.body: Cache authorization results globally across requests.
task_families.query: optimize authorization checks with a global cache

task_families.subject: pattern: translate repository errors at service boundaries
task_families.body: Translate repository errors into typed service errors at the service boundary.
task_families.query: add a service method that handles a repository write failure
